content:
this translation is better I feel
✦ Log in once: Receive 50 Luminous Cores. ✦ Clear Chapter 3 of the Forgotten Chapter in Normal Mode: Receive 50 Luminous Cores. ✦ Clear Chapter 6 of the Forgotten Chapter in Normal Mode: Receive 50 Luminous Cores. ✦ Clear the Final Chapter of the Forgotten Arc (Normal Mode): Receive 50 Luminous Cores. This might be more reasonable—forcing new players to tackle the entire Stellar Arc isn't wise. Insisting players know your game's story is pitifully short is just...
DeepL is my go to translator for asian languages because a lot of things can get lost in translation due to words being able to have 20 definitions it's just the way you use the word in the context
